title: god-eyes
description: A full-stack geospatial intelligence prototype with 8 live data layers (aviation, maritime, satellites, weather, earthquakes, borders, energy, and news) on a CesiumJS 3D globe.

title: AI-Codebase-Onboarding-Agent
description: A code-aware RAG assistant that indexes repositories, extracts symbols/routes, chunks functions, and answers debugging and impact-analysis questions with file-level evidence.

title: AI-Research-Paper-to-Prototype-Agent
description: An agentic RAG workflow that parses AI/ML papers into method breakdowns, implementation roadmaps, starter code structure, and reproducibility reports.

title: AI-RFP-Proposal-Generative-Agent
description: An RFP/tender analysis agent to extract requirements, retrieve company evidence, score compliance, identify risks, and generate proposal drafts.

title: building-energy-anomaly-detection
description: Unsupervised ML pipeline detecting energy anomalies in commercial buildings using Isolation Forest, LOF, and Elliptic Envelope on the BDG2 dataset with rolling statistical features.
